content:
# Moki Sandstone Formation

**Summary**: A Miocene-aged sandstone unit characterized by channelized deposits.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] evaluated the moki-sandstone-formation as a primary reservoir.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] Submarine channels

## Reservoir Properties

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] Porosity 15-22%, Permeability up to 100 mD

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Moki Formation has average effective porosity of 0.18 and permeability up to 100 mD. ([[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024, p. 61]])
